summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ghost-Driver cybersecurity dashboard Config and Community page updates. All new features working correctly with no critical issues found.
passed_tests: ESP module expansion with color picker, sound ESP, head circle, and snap line toggles
RCS module expansion with strength slider (0-100%)
Triggerbot module expansion with delay slider (50-500ms) and key binding options
Cloud Sync functionality saves all config values correctly
Community page shows all 4 new feature suggestions (Discord, Overlay, Leaderboard, Auto-Update)
Community page no longer displays old Countries/Status/Telegram content
Backend API endpoints for all config features (ESP, RCS, Triggerbot)
All frontend UI interactions are clickable and responsive
